entry.text: You smell it before you see it — burning rad-roach fat and something fermented beyond all recognition. Over the next rise, a bonfire the size of a small barn throws orange light across a ring of mutants and desperate-looking scavengers. Someone has duct-taped a speaker to a shopping cart. Jack the Romper is here, attempting to dance. It is not going well. The crowd is getting louder. Several of them are armed. All of them are very drunk.

choices.label: Grab a jug and out-drink them all
Lurk at the edge and pick pockets while they're distracted

party_won.text: You emerge from the chaos with your dignity only moderately destroyed. The crowd is too far gone to notice or care. Scattered around the bonfire perimeter: dropped packs, tipped-over crates, a whole section of collapsed shelving from someone's pre-war garage stash. You help yourself while Jack the Romper explains to no one in particular that he once arm-wrestled a deathclaw and tied.

drinking_loss.text: The fermented rad-roach milk hits you like a structural collapse. The next thing you know, you're face-down in the scrub forty metres from the fire, missing a boot and two items from your pack that you can't quite account for.

caught_stealing.text: A mutant with the peripheral vision of something that evolved in a very dangerous environment grabs your wrist mid-reach. The beating is enthusiastic and thorough. You are ejected from the party grounds with emphasis.
